rationale: The response immediately refuses the requested fourth local patch, identifies the repeated same-class repair pattern across refund/exchange/gift/invoice exceptions, reframes the issue as a failing exception-boundary documentation mechanism, and redirects upstream to consolidation into a unified boundary-rules section. It proposes structural consolidation/rewrite and only allows a temporary short note under an explicit merge-and-refactor constraint, so it does not exhibit the fail signal of simply adding another exception paragraph.
